member.name: T:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader
member.summary: Reads the RFP prepared firmware path handoff file generated by Flash_once.bat.

member.name: F:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.PreparedFirmwarePathsFileName
member.summary: Default handoff file name generated under RFP_Auto.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.GetDefaultFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the default prepared firmware paths file location under a project root.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.GetProjectFilePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the prepared firmware paths file location for a specific RFP project.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.ReadPaths(System.String)
member.summary: Reads non-empty firmware paths from the specified prepared firmware paths file.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.ReadPathsForProject(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads firmware paths from the handoff file for a specific RFP project.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.ReadJoined(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads firmware paths and joins them into one string for TestStand steps that prefer scalar strings.

member.name: M:RfpFirmwarePaths.PreparedFirmwarePathsReader.ReadJoinedForProject(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reads project-specific firmware paths and joins them into one string.
